info.name: IT Infra ERP API
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for IT Infrastructure ERP backend.
Base URL: {{baseUrl}}
Auth: Bearer {{accessToken}}

Sections:
1. Auth
2. Dashboard
3. HRM — Employees
4. HRM — Attendance
5. HRM — Leave Management
6. HRM — Payroll
7. HRM — Departments & Designations
8. HRM — Job Openings
9. Project Management
10. IT Infrastructure — Assets
11. IT Infrastructure — Subscriptions
12. IT Infrastructure — Support Center
13. Contract Management
14. Revenue Management — RA Billing
15. AMC Management
16. Organizational — Companies
17. Organizational — Branches
18. Finance — Invoices
19. Admin — Roles & Permissions

item.name: 1. Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — login, logout, token refresh, signup, OTP flows.

item.name: 2. Dashboard
item.description: Role-aware KPI summary, chart data and recent activity feed. Requires Any Auth.

item.name: 3. HRM — Employees
item.description:
Employee CRUD + document management.
Roles: super-admin | admin | hr (write), Any Auth (read own).

item.name: 4. HRM — Attendance
item.description: GPS check-in/out, admin approval, insights, and geofence config.

item.name: 5. HRM — Leave Management
item.description: Leave application, approval, and balance.

item.name: 6. HRM — Payroll
item.description: Payroll processing, settings, and payslips.

query.description: Search by employee name or ID

body.raw:
{
  "payCycle": "Monthly",
  "calculationBasis": "WorkingDays",
  "pfEnabled": true,
  "pfRate": 12,
  "pfEmployerRate": 12,
  "esiEnabled": true,
  "esiRate": 0.75,
  "esiEmployerRate": 3.25,
  "ptEnabled": true,
  "tdsEnabled": false,
  "salaryComponents": [
    { "id": "BASIC", "name": "Basic Salary", "type": "Earning", "calculationType": "Percentage", "percentageValue": 40, "isTaxable": true, "isStatutory": true },
    { "id": "HRA", "name": "House Rent Allowance", "type": "Earning", "calculationType": "Percentage", "percentageValue": 20, "isTaxable": true, "isStatutory": false }
  ]
}

item.name: 7. HRM — Departments & Designations
item.description: Manage organization structure.

item.name: 8. HRM — Job Openings
item.description: Recruitment and hiring.

item.name: 9. Project Management
item.description: Project tracking and team allocation.

item.name: 10. IT Infrastructure — Assets
item.description: Inventory and allocation of company/employee assets.

item.name: 11. IT Infrastructure — Subscriptions
item.description: Recurring service subscriptions and maintenance contracts.

item.name: 12. IT Infrastructure — Support Center
item.description: Enterprise service request and issue tracking with SLA monitoring.

item.name: 13. Contract Management
item.description: Lifecycle management of client contracts and billing tracking.
